## Problem

What problem should this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

Who would use this, and in what workflow?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Notes

Does this fit the current project boundaries?

- [ ] Standard-library friendly
- [ ] Framework-neutral
- [ ] Does not require hosted services
- [ ] Keeps memory behavior inspectable

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or sketches if useful.
